title: Relationship-Based Access Control (ReBAC)
description: Analyze Google’s Zanzibar paper to understand the principles of Relationship-Based Access Control. Implement fine-grained, recursive permissioning systems for complex user-resource ownership graphs. Design scalable ReBAC solutions capable of managing permissions at a global scale.
objectives: Analyze Google’s Zanzibar paper to understand the principles of Relationship-Based Access Control.
Implement fine-grained, recursive permissioning systems for complex user-resource ownership graphs.
Design scalable ReBAC solutions capable of managing permissions at a global scale.
